name: puntovivo
description: Modern POS Solutions System - Desktop Application

scripts.ci:web: pnpm run ci:shared && pnpm run ci:audit && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/web run typecheck && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/web run lint && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/web run test:coverage -- --run && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/web run build && node --test scripts/check-bundle-size.test.mjs scripts/check-contrast.test.mjs scripts/check-lighthouse.test.mjs scripts/ensure-playwright-browser.test.mjs scripts/run-lighthouse-gate.test.mjs && node scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs && node scripts/run-lighthouse-gate.mjs --strict --require-measurement
scripts.ci:desktop: pnpm run ci:shared && pnpm run ci:audit && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/server run build && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/web run build && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/desktop run build:main && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/desktop run typecheck && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/desktop run lint && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/desktop run test && node --test scripts/check-electron-memory.test.mjs scripts/ensure-migrations-bundled.test.mjs scripts/run-electron-memory-gate.test.mjs && node scripts/run-electron-memory-gate.mjs --strict --require-measurement
scripts.ci:server: pnpm run ci:shared && pnpm run ci:audit && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/server run lint && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/server run test:coverage
scripts.test:e2e:web: node scripts/ensure-playwright-browser.mjs && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/server run native:ensure:node && playwright test --config=playwright.web.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:web:prerelease: node scripts/ensure-playwright-browser.mjs && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/server run native:ensure:node && playwright test --config=playwright.web.config.ts --grep @prerelease-money --workers=1 --forbid-only
scripts.test:e2e:electron: pnpm --filter @puntovivo/server run build && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/desktop run electron:ensure:binary && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/desktop run build:main && node scripts/ensure-electron-main-build.mjs && pnpm --filter @puntovivo/server run native:ensure:node && playwright test --config=playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run test:e2e:web && pnpm run test:e2e:electron
scripts.test:release-script: node --test scripts/upload-release-assets.test.mjs scripts/github-cli-utils.test.mjs scripts/rewrite-update-feed.test.mjs scripts/update-rollout-workflow.test.mjs scripts/clean-paths.test.mjs scripts/prerelease-e2e-workflow.test.mjs
